data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Amazon uses advanced DDoS protection mechanisms to guard against large-scale attacks.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Implements robust encryption for data at rest and in transit.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: A comprehensive IAM system to monitor and control access across all resources.
data.technical_spec: AWS IAM, MFA, Role-based access control

data.title: Threat Intelligence
data.description: Amazon collects and analyzes threat intelligence data to proactively prevent security incidents.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular vulnerability assessments and patch management protocols are in place.
